tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold and packaging
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create uv project with pyproject.toml, directory structure, git init, repos.yml manifest.

**Files:**
- Create: pyproject.toml, repos.yml, src/sql_nav_bench/__init__.py, src/sql_nav_bench/cli.py
- Create: LICENSE, README.md, tools/sqlprism.yml, tools/baseline.yml

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "repos.yml", "src/sql_nav_bench/__init__.py", "src/sql_nav_bench/cli.py", "tools/sqlprism.yml", "tools/baseline.yml"], "verifyCommand": "cd /home/alfred/code/sql-nav-bench && uv sync && uv run sql-nav-bench --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["uv sync succeeds", "sql-nav-bench --help works", "repos.yml has 4 repos", "git initialized"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Pydantic models
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define Task, Gold, Result, Metrics, RepoManifest pydantic models.

**Files:**
- Create: src/sql_nav_bench/models.py, tests/test_models.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/models.py", "tests/test_models.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_models.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["models validate correctly", "invalid data raises ValidationError", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: YAML loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load task and result YAML files into pydantic models.

**Files:**
- Create: src/sql_nav_bench/loader.py, tests/test_loader.py, tests/fixtures/

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/loader.py", "tests/test_loader.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_loader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loaders work correctly", "invalid YAML raises errors", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scorer — set_match and efficiency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement P/R/F1 scoring and efficiency normalization.

**Files:**
- Create: src/sql_nav_bench/scorer.py, tests/test_scorer.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/scorer.py", "tests/test_scorer.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_scorer.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["set_match scoring correct", "efficiency normalization works", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Report generator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate markdown comparison tables and JSON summaries.

**Files:**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/report.py", "tests/test_report.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_report.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["comparison table works", "JSON summary works", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Repo setup command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement sql-nav-bench setup with sparse checkout.

**Files:**
- Create: src/sql_nav_bench/setup.py, tests/test_setup.py
- Modify: src/sql_nav_bench/cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/setup.py", "tests/test_setup.py", "src/sql_nav_bench/cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_setup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clone commands correct", "sparse checkout works", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire CLI commands
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Connect tasks, score, compare, validate CLI commands.

- Create: tests/test_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sql_nav_bench/cli.py", "tests/test_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all CLI commands work", "filters work", "all tests pass"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Jaffle-mesh gold set
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create 10 benchmark tasks for jaffle-mesh trio.

**Files:**
- Create: tasks/jaffle-mesh/*.yml (10 files)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tasks/jaffle-mesh/"], "verifyCommand": "uv run sql-nav-bench validate", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10 tasks created", "gold answers verified", "validate passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Remaining repo task sets
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create ~10 tasks each for sqlmesh-examples, mozilla-bigquery, cal-itp.

**Files:**
- Create: tasks/sqlmesh-examples/*.yml, tasks/mozilla-bigquery/*.yml, tasks/cal-itp/*.yml

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tasks/sqlmesh-examples/", "tasks/mozilla-bigquery/", "tasks/cal-itp/"], "verifyCommand": "uv run sql-nav-bench validate && uv run sql-nav-bench tasks", "acceptanceCriteria": ["~30 tasks created", "gold answers verified", "validate passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: End-to-end integration test
tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 10: Lint, validation, and README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final code quality, README, prepare v0.1.0.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md, pyproject.toml

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "uv run ruff check . && uv run pytest tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lint passes", "all tests pass", "README complete"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
